description_long: This is a modern, minimalist wooden table with a rectangular top and base, both featuring softly rounded corners. The table is supported by a central, thick vertical panel that connects the tabletop to the base, with two additional vertical side panels creating a geometric, open-sided structure. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the table a natural and warm appearance. The design is sturdy and functional, with no visible hardware, drawers, or decorative embellishments. Its open sides and solid construction suggest it is suitable for both practical and aesthetic use in urban environments. The overall look is clean, contemporary, and versatile, making it appropriate for public spaces, parks, or communal areas.
description: A modern, minimalist wooden table with a rectangular top, central support, and open-sided geometric design. The visible wood grain and rounded corners give it a warm, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular tabletop, central support panel, and open sides with visible wood grain.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tabletop and base, as well as the open geometric structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid central support panel and the full width of the tabletop and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the open side and the thickness of the panels.
attribute_number_of_legs: central panel with two side supports
